prompt: What do you know about my Claude Skills project? What decisions have been made so far and why?

assertions.text: found-project-note: Found and read the Claude-Skills project note from memory
followed-links: Discovered related notes by following wikilinks (not just keyword search)
includes-decisions: Response lists the key decisions from the project
includes-reasoning: Response includes the WHY behind decisions, not just bare facts
mentions-related-context: References info from linked notes (e.g., filesystem-over-API pattern, user preferences)
